Record Class ClanCommandContext

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.command.player.ClanCommandContext
public record ClanCommandContext(ClanService clanService, ClanInviteService inviteService, TerritoryService territoryService, ClanCache clanCache, ClanTeleportWarmupManager warmupManager, ClanPermissionMenu permissionMenu, ClanWarpService warpService, ClanWarpMenu warpMenu) extends Record
Shared services and helpers passed to every /clan subcommand.

The require* helpers send the player an error and return null when a precondition fails, so a subcommand can short-circuit with if (x == null) return ...;.

    DATE_FMT
    Shared date formatter for clan creation timestamps.

    Shared MiniMessage serializer for authoring player-facing text.

    requireClan(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
    Returns the player's clan, or sends an error and returns null if they are not in one.
    Clan

    Returns the player's clan if they are the LEADER, or sends an error and returns null.
    Clan
    requirePermission(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, ClanPermission permission)
    Returns the player's clan if they hold the given permission (or are LEADER), or sends an error and returns null.

    Resolves a player's name from their UUID, falling back to the UUID string if offline.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanCommandContext

      public ClanCommandContext(ClanService clanService, ClanInviteService inviteService, TerritoryService territoryService, ClanCache clanCache, ClanTeleportWarmupManager warmupManager, ClanPermissionMenu permissionMenu, ClanWarpService warpService, ClanWarpMenu warpMenu)
      Creates an instance of a ClanCommandContext record class.
      Parameters:
      clanService - the value for the clanService record component
      inviteService - the value for the inviteService record component
      territoryService - the value for the territoryService record component
      clanCache - the value for the clanCache record component
      warmupManager - the value for the warmupManager record component
      permissionMenu - the value for the permissionMenu record component
      warpService - the value for the warpService record component
      warpMenu - the value for the warpMenu record component

  • Method Details

    • requireClan

      public Clan requireClan(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns the player's clan, or sends an error and returns null if they are not in one.
      Parameters:
      player - the command sender
      Returns:
      the player's clan, or null

    • requireLeader

      public Clan requireLeader(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns the player's clan if they are the LEADER, or sends an error and returns null.
      Parameters:
      player - the command sender
      Returns:
      the player's clan, or null

    • requirePermission

      public Clan requirePermission(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, ClanPermission permission)
      Returns the player's clan if they hold the given permission (or are LEADER), or sends an error and returns null.
      Parameters:
      player - the command sender
      permission - the required clan permission
      Returns:
      the player's clan, or null

    • resolvePlayerName

      public String resolvePlayerName(UUID uuid)
      Resolves a player's name from their UUID, falling back to the UUID string if offline.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player UUID
      Returns:
      the resolved name, or the UUID string

    • rootCause

      public String rootCause(Throwable ex)
      Unwraps a failed async chain to its root cause message for display.
      Parameters:
      ex - the throwable from an async chain
      Returns:
      the deepest non-null message, or a generic fallback

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
